headline: 35+ contracts catalogued across Ethereum and multiple chains; governance, pool, proxy, guardian, and executor addresses identified from docs, block explorers, and address-book; V4 hub/spoke addresses newly surfaced from official docs.

findings.text: Block-explorer name-tag search surfaced: Ethereum Pool V3 at 0x87870bca3f3fd6335c3f4ce8392d69350b4fa4e2 (Etherscan label 'Aave: Pool V3'), Pool Addresses Provider at 0x2f39d218133AFaB8F2B819B1066c7E434Ad94E9e ('Aave: Pool Address Provider V3'), Prime Market Pool Addresses Provider at 0xcfBf336fe147D643B9Cb705648500e101504B16d ('Aave: Prime Market Pool Addresses Provider V3'), Optimism Pool Addresses Provider at 0xa97684ead0e402dc232d5a977953df7ecbab3cdb ('Aave: Pool Addresses Provider V3'). Full per-chain D1 sweep blocked by remaining fetch budget — partial sweep of 4 chains only.

Official deployed contracts page found at https://aave.com/docs/resources/addresses. Fetched successfully; rendered page showed Aave V4 Ethereum hub/spoke/peripheral addresses (Core Hub 0xCca852Bc40e560adC3b1Cc58CA5b55638ce826c9, Plus Hub 0x0600...536A, Prime Hub 0x9438...F931, and 20+ additional contracts). V3 addresses on the same page appear to render dynamically and were not present in the static HTML. The page is recorded as deployed_contracts_doc.

aave.com/security fetched successfully. Lists audits from ABDK, OpenZeppelin, Trail of Bits, PeckShield, SigmaPrime, Certora for V3.0 (Jan 2022); additional audits for V3.0.1, V3.0.2, V3.1 (Certora, MixBytes, Cantina), V3.2 (Certora, Enigma, Oxorio, Pashov), V3.3 (Certora, StErMi, Oxorio, Sherlock), V3.4 (Certora, StErMi, Blackthorn, Enigma), V3.5 (Certora, StErMi, MixBytes, ABDK), V3.6 (Blackthorn, Certora, MixBytes, Savant, Pashov), GHO (SigmaPrime, ABDK, OpenZeppelin, Certora), Umbrella (MixBytes, Ackee, StErMi, Certora). All audit PDFs point to github.com/aave-dao/aave-v3-origin/blob/main/audits/. No in-scope addresses tables were retrieved (would require fetching individual PDF URLs).

GitHub repo https://github.com/aave-dao/aave-v3-origin fetched at main branch (latest commit SHA not pinnable — GitHub HTML doesn't expose commit SHA in rendered page content). Repo contains audits/, src/, scripts/ directories. No broadcast/run-latest.json or hardhat-deploy artifacts were found at top-level; the repo is a Foundry-based source-only repo without deployment artifacts. bgd-labs/aave-address-book (separate repo) is the canonical address registry; its README confirms AaveV3Ethereum.POOL = 0x87870Bca3F3fD6335C3F4ce8392D69350B4fA4E2.

Multi-chain: Protocol.chains lists 21 chains. D1 block-explorer sweep attempted for Ethereum (found Pool V3 and Pool Addresses Provider), Optimism (Pool Addresses Provider 0xa97684ead0e402dc232d5a977953df7ecbab3cdb surfaced from search), Polygon (Pool Addresses Provider 0xa97684ead0e402dc232d5a977953df7ecbab3cdb on polygonscan). Remaining chains (Arbitrum, Plasma, Base, Avalanche, Binance, Mantle, xDai, Linea, MegaETH, Sonic, Scroll, Celo, zkSync Era, Metis, Soneium, X Layer, Fantom, Harmony) not fully swept due to exhausted fetch budget.

No factory-child enumeration attempted; Aave V3 uses PoolAddressesProvider as registry rather than a classic factory pattern. Pool proxy children (aTokens, debtTokens) are minted per-reserve — thousands of instances. These are leaf assets not enumerated per D6 cap rules. PoolAddressesProvider (0x2f39d218133AFaB8F2B819B1066c7E434Ad94E9e on Ethereum) is the canonical registry; enumeration deferred to control/autonomy slices.

Role taxonomy applied: 12 address_book entries from prior runs classified; 3 new addresses added (Pool, PoolAddressesProvider, OptimismPoolAddressesProvider). Note: address_book entry 0x7b9c0b9b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b appears to be a malformed/dummy address (repeating hex pattern) and is excluded from admin_addresses. One entry 0x220d22f42c1b975B51509c24b174f8AbA7d8C540 ('Short Executor (Governance)') may overlap with 0x851365275f493d15511cc005f2bd71E3c1699921 ('Aave Governance V3 Short Executor') — both carried forward as distinct entries per address_book.

All admin_addresses[] entries trace to fetched URLs (defipunkd surfacer for pre-existing entries; etherscan/search results for Pool V3, Pool Addresses Provider, OptimismPoolAddressesProvider, Prime Market Pool Addresses Provider). Malformed entry 0x7b9c...0d8b excluded. V4 hub addresses from docs/resources/addresses page included as 'other' with vault/hub role for completeness.

rationale.verdict: Discovery run completed with mixed grading basis: 9 on-chain URLs fetched (defipunkd surfacer + block explorers via search grounding), plus 4 docs/GitHub pages. 17 unique Ethereum addresses catalogued (11 from prior address_book minus 1 malformed, plus 6 newly discovered), plus multi-chain addresses for Optimism/Polygon. V4 Ethereum hub addresses newly surfaced from the official docs page. Full 21-chain sweep was not possible within the fetch budget; 17+ chains have zero D5 coverage recorded in unknowns.

evidence.shows: Official website confirming governance forum at governance.aave.com, bug bounty at audits.sherlock.xyz/bug-bounties/300, docs at aave.com/docs, security page at aave.com/security, and GitHub at github.com/aave-dao/aave-v3-origin
Surfacer page for Aave Governance V3 Long Executor on Ethereum (0xa700691dA7b6769562170061709458FF21ed963e); no verified ABI found on etherscan+sourcify; generic method battery shown

Full audit list for Aave V3.0 through V3.6, GHO, and Umbrella; bug bounty link at audits.sherlock.xyz/bug-bounties/300; GitHub source at github.com/aave-dao/aave-v3-origin; multiple audit firms: Trail of Bits, Certora, SigmaPrime, OpenZeppelin, ABDK, PeckShield, MixBytes, Sherlock, Pashov, Oxorio, Enigma, Blackthorn, Savant, Cantina
Documentation index; links to Addresses page at aave.com/docs/resources/addresses; confirms docs_url

Official deployed contracts page listing Aave V4 Ethereum addresses: Core Hub 0xCca852Bc40e560adC3b1Cc58CA5b55638ce826c9, Plus Hub 0x0600...536A (0x06002e9c4412CB7814a791eA3666D905871E536A), Prime Hub 0x9438...F931 (0x943827DCA022D0F354a8a8c332dA1e5Eb9f9F931), Main Spoke 0x94e7...c485, Access Manager 0x08aE...DF01 (0x08aE3BE30958cDd1847ec58fFfd4C451a87fDF01), Hub Configurator 0x1F07...5C3d, Spoke Configurator 0x9BFF...389a, and other peripheral contracts. V3 addresses not present in static render (dynamic tab).
Canonical source code repo for Aave V3.6, Foundry-based; latest release v3.6.0 (Jan 8, 2026); no deployment artifacts at repo root; audits/ directory with all listed audit PDFs
Etherscan label 'Aave: Pool V3' — Ethereum Pool V3 proxy contract at 0x87870bca3f3fd6335c3f4ce8392d69350b4fa4e2

Etherscan label 'Aave: Pool Address Provider V3' — PoolAddressesProvider on Ethereum at 0x2f39d218133AFaB8F2B819B1066c7E434Ad94E9e; Ownable by Aave Governance; proxy admin for Pool/PoolConfigurator/ACLManager
Etherscan label 'Aave: Prime Market Pool Addresses Provider V3' at 0xcfBf336fe147D643B9Cb705648500e101504B16d on Ethereum
Etherscan label 'Aave: Pool Addresses Provider V3' on Optimism at 0xa97684ead0e402dc232d5a977953df7ecbab3cdb
PolygonScan label 'Aave: Pool Addresses Provider V3' on Polygon at 0xa97684ead0e402dc232d5a977953df7ecbab3cdb
BGD Labs aave-address-book: canonical Solidity/JS registry for all Aave ecosystem addresses; confirms AaveV3Ethereum.POOL = 0x87870Bca3F3fD6335C3F4ce8392D69350B4fA4E2

unknowns: D1: block-explorer sweep incomplete — chains Arbitrum, Base, Avalanche, Binance, Mantle, xDai, Linea, MegaETH, Sonic, Scroll, Celo, zkSync Era, Metis, Soneium, X Layer, Fantom, Harmony not swept due to exhausted fetch budget
D2: V3 addresses on docs/resources/addresses rendered dynamically (JavaScript tab) and not present in static HTML fetch; full V3 address list not extracted from official docs page
D3: Audit PDF scope tables not fetched (individual PDFs not retrieved); no in-scope deployed addresses extracted from audit documents

D4: GitHub repo main branch commit SHA not pinnable from rendered HTML; no deployment artifacts (broadcast/run-latest.json, hardhat-deploy) found in aave-v3-origin repo root; bgd-labs/aave-address-book full Ethereum address file not fetched
D5: Plasma, MegaETH, Soneium, X Layer, Sonic — zero addresses surfaced; these chains may be newer deployments not yet indexed or not on supported chainId list
D6: PoolAddressesProvider child enumeration (getPool, ACLManager, PoolConfigurator addresses) not performed via read API due to exhausted fetch budget

D8: address_book entry 0x7b9c0b9b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b0d8b appears malformed (repeating-byte pattern, role 'Emergency Admin') — excluded from admin_addresses; source of this entry unclear, requires verification in next run

protocol_metadata.about: Aave V3 is a decentralised, non-custodial lending protocol where users supply assets to earn yield and borrow against over-collateralised positions across multiple EVM chains. Each market is managed through a PoolAddressesProvider that acts as an upgradeable proxy admin for the Pool, PoolConfigurator, ACLManager, and oracle contracts, with all upgrades requiring on-chain governance vote execution. The protocol issues aTokens (yield-bearing receipt tokens) to suppliers and variable-rate debtTokens to borrowers, with protocol risk parameters set by AAVE token-holder governance via timelocked executors.
